title: Mother-in-law captured abroad after cold-blooded execution of beauty queen daughter-in-law
description: Erika Maria Herrera, 62, was arrested in Venezuela on Wednesday for the femicide of Carolina Flores Gomez, 27, inside her Mexico City apartment on April 15.
content:
The mother-in-law of a one-time Mexican beauty queen has been arrested for her murder after fleeing the country. 
Erika Maria Herrera, 62, was arrested in Venezuela on Wednesday for the femicide of … [+3762 chars]
de: Schwiegermutter im Ausland gefangen genommen, nachdem die Schwiegertochter der Schönheitskönigin kaltblütig hingerichtet wurde. Erika Maria Herrera, 62, wurde am Mittwoch in Venezuela wegen des Femizids an Carolina Flores Gomez, 27, in ihrer Wohnung in Mexiko-Stadt am 15. April verhaftet.
en: Mother-in-law captured abroad after cold-blooded execution of beauty queen daughter-in-law. Erika Maria Herrera, 62, was arrested in Venezuela on Wednesday for the femicide of Carolina Flores Gomez, 27, inside her Mexico City apartment on April 15.
la: Socrus foris cepit post supplicium pulchritudinis reginae nurus frigidae. Erika Maria Herrera, 62, in Venezuela die Mercurii ob femicidam Carolinae Flores Gomez comprehensus est, 27. intra eam in urbe Mexici conclavis die XV Aprilis.

title: How well can EVs handle the heat — and the cold? AAA put them to the test
description: Electric vehicles lose some range in the winter — and, to a lesser degree, in the summer. But exactly how much? AAA has brand-new data.
content:
Electric vehicle batteries are a lot like people, in one important respect: They're most comfortable in temperatures around 65 to 75 degrees Fahrenheit.
When the weather gets much colder or hotter t… [+7048 chars]
de: Wie gut können Elektrofahrzeuge mit Hitze und Kälte umgehen? AAA hat sie auf die Probe gestellt. Elektrofahrzeuge verlieren im Winter etwas an Reichweite – und in geringerem Maße auch im Sommer. Aber wie viel genau? AAA verfügt über brandneue Daten.
en: How well can EVs handle the heat — and the cold? AAA put them to the test. Electric vehicles lose some range in the winter — and, to a lesser degree, in the summer. But exactly how much? AAA has brand-new data.
la: Quam bene tractat EVs calorem et frigus? AAA experirentur. Electric vehicula aliquam rhoncus amittunt in hieme - et ad minus, in aestate. Sed istuc quid multa? AAA datam novam habet.

title: Posttranslational modifications remodel proteome-wide ligandability
description: A chemoproteomic strategy reveals how posttranslational modifications reshape protein ligandability across the human proteome, uncovering more than 400 state-dependent interactions, including phosphorylation-driven control of KRAS inhibitor activity.
content:
Cell culture and treatment
MDA-MB-231 (HTB-26), HEK293T (CRL-3216), H460 (HTB-177), MIA PaCa2 (CRL-1420) and H1975 (CRL-5908) cell lines were procured from the American Type Culture Collection; HCC4… [+40586 chars]
de: Posttranslationale Modifikationen verändern die proteomweite Ligandierbarkeit. Eine chemoproteomische Strategie enthüllt, wie posttranslationale Modifikationen die Ligandierbarkeit von Proteinen im gesamten menschlichen Proteom umgestalten und deckt mehr als 400 zustandsabhängige Wechselwirkungen auf, einschließlich der durch Phosphorylierung gesteuerten Kontrolle der KRAS-Inhibitoraktivität.
en: Posttranslational modifications remodel proteome-wide ligandability. A chemoproteomic strategy reveals how posttranslational modifications reshape protein ligandability across the human proteome, uncovering more than 400 state-dependent interactions, including phosphorylation-driven control of KRAS inhibitor activity.
la: Modificationes posttranslationales convellere ligandabilitatem proteome-latam. Consilium chemoproteomicum ostendit quomodo modificationes posttranslationales repraesentent dapibus ligandabilitatis per tutelam humanam, detegendo plus quam 400 interactiones status dependentes, incluso phosphorylatione agitatae imperium KRAS inhibitoris actuositatis.
